title: PhaseBriefingContract
description: The typed JSON contract the Coder produces inside <phase_briefing> tags. Maps to the 7 required sections of the Phase Review Briefing Template (Artifact Specifications §Phase Review Briefing Template).

scope.description: One-line description of what this briefing covers (Header block).

spec_section.description: Which Plan section is being implemented (e.g. '§P8').

status.description: Document status per Artifact Specifications Standard Vocabularies.

files_changed.description: What Was Built — file-level changes (section 2). At least one entry required.

file.description: File path relative to project root.

compliance_items.description: Architecture Compliance — invariant to evidence mapping (section 3). At least one entry required.

evidence.description: How the implementation satisfies the invariant.

what_to_review.description: What to Review — numbered questions for the reviewer (section 4). At least one entry required.

test_areas.description: Test Coverage Summary — per-area coverage table (section 5). At least one entry required.

tests_added.description: Test names or description of tests added.

how_to_activate.description: How to Activate for Testing — runbook-style instructions (section 6).

next_phase.description: Next Phase — preview of what ships after this phase (section 7).
